summary: A brief podcast description from the Milken Institute highlighting Judy Faulkner's founding of Epic Systems in Wisconsin and the company's employee-owned culture dedicated to supporting healthcare workers.

principles.statement: Build a culture of ownership where employees view themselves as heroes helping heroes.
principles.rationale: Fostering hard work and ownership aligns the staff with the mission of supporting frontline healthcare workers.
principles.source_quote: We do have a culture of ownership, of working hard, of wanting to be heroes helping heroes.

signature_quotes.text: We do have a culture of ownership, of working hard, of wanting to be heroes helping heroes. That's one of the things you hear our staff say.
signature_quotes.context: Describing the internal culture and mission of Epic Systems staff.
